# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Build stunning modular lamps with free STL files and a live 3D preview. Mix bases, shades, and adapters to create lighting that&#39;s truly yours. Start designing free today!

### How It Works
https://example.com/how-it-works
Discover how LampForge lets you mix and match the shade, base, and adapter components with a real-time 3D preview — then download print-ready STL files instantly.

### Pricing
https://example.com/pricing
From free STL files for hobbyists to commercial resale rights for merchants — LampForge pricing plans scale with your ambition. Find your perfect tier and start printing today.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions about custom window treatments, bulk licensing, or your LampForge subscription? Reach our team now and get expert help tailored to designers, makers, and merchants.
